artifacts.purpose: Configurable project scaffold, baseline scenes and prefabs, and validation tools.
non_claims: No consumer architecture is mandatory
No runtime device behavior is claimed
Historical root-path smoke evidence does not prove the canonical nested Git path

artifacts.purpose: Vendor-neutral XR greybox initialization, rig helpers, configuration, and interaction validation.
non_claims: No vendor runtime is bundled
No headset behavior is claimed without device evidence
Historical root-path smoke evidence does not prove the canonical nested Git path

artifacts.purpose: Engine-light Inventory domain model, transactions, policies, events, snapshots, and persistence contracts.
non_claims: No Unity authoring, UI, equipment, persistence provider, networking, or XR adapter is included
Candidate promotion waits for an immutable install from the canonical nested repository path
Clean-consumer Core evidence does not prove the complete Inventory product family

artifacts.purpose: Positive-source-only architecture, package boundaries, capability coverage, and verification gates for a reusable Inventory package family.
non_claims: Every current package path remains incubating until its canonical nested-path evidence passes
No community Inventory repository is an admitted code seed
Historical evidence is not transferred across a package ID, renderer, device, runtime, build, or input boundary
No headset usability or comfort is claimed before a recorded device receipt for the exact composition

artifacts.purpose: ScriptableObject item, catalog, container, and inventory authoring with deterministic Core conversion and actionable validation.
non_claims: No player state is stored in authoring assets
No UGUI, XR, scene, storage provider, or product content is included
Candidate promotion waits for an immutable install from the canonical nested repository path
Authoring evidence does not prove later presentation or XR layers

artifacts.purpose: Renderer-neutral Inventory view state, immutable view models, semantic intents, view port, and presenter.
non_claims: No UGUI, UI Toolkit, XR, scene, device, styling, localization, or input implementation is included
Roslyn runtime compilation does not replace a fresh Unity consumer and immutable Git install
No old renderer-owned presentation namespace is an active compatibility surface

artifacts.purpose: UGUI renderer bindings with independently replaceable nested prefab roles and replayable neutral states.
non_claims: No XR Interaction Toolkit dependency or world-space comfort claim
No product styling, scene, localization catalog, or item database
Fresh clean-consumer and candidate review remain pending

artifacts.purpose: Peer UI Toolkit renderer bindings, UXML/USS role composition, semantic input routing, and state samples.
non_claims: No UGUI Canvas or prefab is reused
No XR Interaction Toolkit, world-space, or headset claim is included in the renderer package
Fresh Unity consumer and immutable Git evidence remain pending

artifacts.purpose: Renderer-explicit world-space Inventory UGUI composition, strict XR input validation, tracked-ray and poke routes, and a device-evidence-ready sample.
non_claims: No XR Origin, EventSystem, OpenXR provider, or vendor SDK is bundled
Fresh install/build and exact PICO renderer tuple evidence remain pending

artifacts.purpose: Renderer-explicit world-space Inventory UI Toolkit composition, XRI input-route contract, fail-closed validation, and Device Lab-ready sample.
non_claims: No UGUI Canvas, GraphicRaycaster, XR Origin, provider, or vendor SDK is bundled
UGUI automated or device evidence cannot promote the UI Toolkit route
Fresh install/build and independent named-device evidence remain pending

artifacts.purpose: Canonical engine, foundation, system-family, and installable-package layout for human and Agent discovery.
non_claims: No unimplemented engine root is advertised
No old-path compatibility layer is provided
Repository folders do not replace independent package manifests or evidence
